items.title: Benefit fraudster who lived in Scotland for two decades needed interpreter at court
items.deck: A benefit fraudster who has lived in Scotland for 20 years needed a taxpayer- funded interpreter to help with his English when he landed back in court.

items.title: Shocking moment Florida woman beats pregnant driver and attacks elderly bystander before BITING cop in horror road rage outburst
items.deck: Mandolyn Shaffer-Brockwell, 37, was arrested on February 23 after allegedly getting into a violent road rage altercation involved her, a pregnant woman, elderly driver and police officer.

items.title: This 16-year-old refused a $300,000 offer to drop out of high school and now runs his own AI company
Now Greens want ban on homework and school exams

items.title: Cuban foreign minister: Military preparing for 'possibility' of aggression amid Trump threats

items.title: ICE agents will be deployed to U.S. airports on Monday: Homan

items.title: Obama slammed for praising late ‘Russiagate’ prober Robert Mueller’s ‘commitment to rule of law’
items.deck: Former President Barack Obama sparked a social-media firestorm with his post praising former FBI Director Robert Mueller’s “commitment to the rule of law” after his death Saturday.

items.title: Israel Orders Military to Intensify Demolitions in Southern Lebanon
items.deck: Israel Katz, the defense minister, said he ordered troops to destroy more bridges and buildings in southern Lebanon, stoking worries that Israel was widening a military-controlled buffer zone there.

items.title: Meteorite Crashes Through Roof of House Near Houston
items.deck: No one was injured, but a woman was startled on Saturday when a meteorite pierced the roof of her home, ricocheted off the floor and struck a bedroom ceiling.
